name: pakistan-disease-surveillance
title: Pakistan Disease Surveillance and Immunization Coverage (Time Series)
description: Long-format annual time series of Pakistan's communicable-disease burden and childhood immunization coverage (measles, DPT, hepatitis B, polio, malaria incidence, and HIV prevalence), compiled from the World Bank Open Data / World Development Indicators API.

fields.name: value
fields.description: Observed value for that indicator and year.

fields.name: unit
fields.description: Unit of measure for the value.
